heroHeadline:
US & Israel Strike Iran,
War Enters Third Week
heroSubtitle: Operation Epic Fury enters Day 14. Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement vows Hormuz stays closed — oil spikes past $100. IEA releases record 400M barrels. 6 ships struck in Persian Gulf in 48 hrs; ~500 tankers stranded. Hezbollah's biggest rocket barrage yet hits northern Israel; IRGC+Hezbollah joint attack strikes 50+ Israeli targets. Lebanon: 634 killed, 800,000 displaced. Pentagon investigating girls' school strike (165 killed). Trump: 'Nothing left to hit.'
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 13, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
